name: Zitronenherzen (Lemon Hearts)
recipeInstructions:
Beat egg yolks, 2/3 cup sugar and vanilla until thick and lemon colored. Stir in half the finely ground almonds, lemon extract, baking powder. Transfer dough to well-sugared surface. Knead in remaining almonds to form soft dough. Shape into ball. Refrigerate about 1-1/2 hours. Preheat oven to 400°F. Line baking sheet with greased wax paper.
Roll dough on lightly sugar surface to 1/4 inch thick. Cut out heart shaped cookies. Bake until edges are golden, 8-10 minutes. Spread icing on warm cookies.
